'''鈭歯g-sh-m''' ('''kangasham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dumfounder|dumfounder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dumfounder|dumfounder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-sh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kangasham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingasham|thingasham]] || [[word:jingasham|jingasham]] || [[word:shingasham|shingasham]] || [[word:kingasham|kingasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungasham|thuthungasham]] || [[word:jujungasham|jujungasham]] || [[word:shushungasham|shushungasham]] || [[word:kukungasham|kukungasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungasham|thungasham]] || [[word:jungasham|jungasham]] || [[word:shungasham|shungasham]] || [[word:kungasham|kungasham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungasham|thungasham]] || [[word:jungasham|jungasham]] || [[word:shungasham|shungasham]] || [[word:kungasham|kungasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengasham|thengasham]] || [[word:jengasham|jengasham]] || [[word:shengasham|shengasham]] || [[word:kengasham|kengasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongasham|thothongasham]] || [[word:jojongasham|jojongasham]] || [[word:shoshongasham|shoshongasham]] || [[word:kokongasham|kokongasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongasham|thongasham]] || [[word:jongasham|jongasham]] || [[word:shongasham|shongasham]] || [[word:kongasham|kongasham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongasham|thongasham]] || [[word:jongasham|jongasham]] || [[word:shongasham|shongasham]] || [[word:kongasham|kongasham]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]] || [[word:ngasham|ngasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngasham|th忙ngasham]] || [[word:j忙ngasham|j忙ngasham]] || [[word:sh忙ngasham|sh忙ngasham]] || [[word:k忙ngasham|k忙ngasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangasham|thathangasham]] || [[word:jajangasham|jajangasham]] || [[word:shashangasham|shashangasham]] || [[word:kakangasham|kakangasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangasham|thangasham]] || [[word:jangasham|jangasham]] || [[word:shangasham|shangasham]] || [[word:kangasham|kangasham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangasham|thangasham]] || [[word:jangasham|jangasham]] || [[word:shangasham|shangasham]] || [[word:kangasham|kangasham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangasham|shangasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangasham|goshangasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangasham|gokishangasham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangashamn眉|shangashamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangashamnkn眉|goshangashamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashamn眉|gokishangashamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangashamsh毛|shangashamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangashamnksh毛|goshangashamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangashamsh毛|gokishangashamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashamro|shangashamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashamnkro|goshangashamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashamro|gokishangashamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashammu|shangashammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashamnkmu|goshangashamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashammu|gokishangashammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangashamsher|shangashamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangashamnksher|goshangashamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangashamsher|gokishangashamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangashamng|shangashamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangashamnkng|goshangashamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangashamng|gokishangashamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangashamya|shangashamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangashamnkya|goshangashamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangashamya|gokishangashamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangashamyam|shangashamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangashamnkyam|goshangashamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangashamyam|gokishangashamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashamn眉sh毛|shangashamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashamnkn眉sh毛|goshangashamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashamn眉sh毛|gokishangashamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashamn眉ro|shangashamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashamnkn眉ro|goshangashamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashamn眉ro|gokishangashamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashamn眉mu|shangashamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashamnkn眉mu|goshangashamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashamn眉mu|gokishangashamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashamsh毛n眉|shangashamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashamnksh毛n眉|goshangashamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashamsh毛n眉|gokishangashamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashamsh毛ro|shangashamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashamnksh毛ro|goshangashamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashamsh毛ro|gokishangashamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashamsh毛mu|shangashamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashamnksh毛mu|goshangashamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashamsh毛mu|gokishangashamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashamron眉|shangashamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashamnkron眉|goshangashamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashamron眉|gokishangashamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashamrosh毛|shangashamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashamnkrosh毛|goshangashamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashamrosh毛|gokishangashamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashamromu|shangashamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashamnkromu|goshangashamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashamromu|gokishangashamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashammun眉|shangashammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashamnkmun眉|goshangashamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashammun眉|gokishangashammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashammush毛|shangashammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashamnkmush毛|goshangashamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashammush毛|gokishangashammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashammuro|shangashammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashamnkmuro|goshangashamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashammuro|gokishangashammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
